Dev hit a blocker on "Optimize CLAUDE.md generation - reduce from 40.9k to under 38k chars"
detail: Cannot reach 38k target. CLAUDE.md is now 39935 chars (down from 41015, saved 1080). The remaining ~1935 chars to cut would require editing server.js rebuildClaudeMd() function where ~25k of team rules are HARDCODED (lines 920-1293). Config files (security-rules.md + capabilities.md) have already been tightened and only total 3.3k chars combined - cutting them further would lose substance. The architecture issue: team-rules.md is NOT used as source for CLAUDE.md generation, contrary to the task assumption. Need owner decision: either (a) allow server.js edit for this task, or (b) accept 39.9k as the achievable target without platform file changes.
